items.title: Deep Learning (Goodfellow, Bengio, Courville)
items.author: Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio, Aaron Courville
items.note: Chapter 6 on deep feedforward networks: activation functions, sigmoid saturation, and the vanishing-gradient problem.

items.title: Learning representations by back-propagating errors (Nature, 1986)
items.author: Rumelhart, Hinton, Williams
items.note: Seminal backpropagation paper that popularized sigmoid hidden units in multilayer networks.

items.title: Long Short-Term Memory (Neural Computation, 1997)
items.author: Hochreiter, Schmidhuber
items.note: Introduces LSTM with sigmoid gates — a lasting application of bounded (0,1) activations.

items.title: PyTorch torch.sigmoid documentation
items.author: PyTorch developers
items.note: API reference for the element-wise sigmoid operator and its relationship to BCEWithLogitsLoss.
